title: Culpitt 7" Square Cake Boards, 1.75mm Cards For Celebration Desserts, Birthday Treats, Tiered Sponge, Cupcakes, and More! Lightweight, Square, Pack Of 5
features: 1.75 mm Cake Cards - At 1.75mm thick, these square cake cards are ideal for sponge celebration cakes and for using between the individual layers in a stacked cake.

Beautiful Silver Foil - Traditional silver coloured, embossed foil finish on the top and sides with a white paper on the reverse. Attractive turned edge helps display your cakes beautifully making these cards a great choice both practically and aesthetically.

Lightweight Cake Card - Designed for lightweight sponge cakes, cupcake displays, and for using between layers in a tiered wedding or birthday cake. This lightweight cake board features a silver foil edge detail, ideal for when you may see the edge of the board.

Pack of 5 Cards - Designed for regular cake makers and bakers this large pack of 5 Cake Boards is ideal to keep in the kitchen ready for your next creation! 7" x 7". Shrink wrapped together for hygiene.

Culpitt Baking & Cake Decorating - The Extensive Culpitt range has everything you need to give your cakes that professional touch from Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Food Colouring, Fondant, Cupcake Cases, And Candles.
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Established in 1921, Culpitt has been providing cake decorations for nearly 100 years. We are based in Northumberland and one of the UK’s leading manufacturers of cake decorating and baking supplies. Some of the world’s best cake designers and decorators use Culpitt items. Our products are supplied to over 5580 professional customers, from market leading grocery supermarkets to couture wedding cake designers and deliver to over 47,500 consumers. Products in the Culpitt range include Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Cake Toppers, Birthday Candles, Food Colours, Fondant Icing, Cupcake Cases, Tin Liners, Sprinkles, and more! UK Brand & Manufacturer Professional quality products for bakeries and home Newest and the best premium-quality products that lead the industry Huge product range including food colours, cake boards, cake boxes, baking cases, and fondant icing The Culpitt Range Includes Ready-to-Roll Fondant Icing The ideal fondant for covering all your celebration cakes Culpitt Select, Satinara, and Create A Cake Sugar Paste Icing is designed to give the very best results every time. Choose from classic White or Ivory or make a statement with Red, Gold, Silver, Blue, Green, Black, Pink, or Yellow. Cake Boards Available in classic Silver and a huge range of colours including Blue, Black, Gold, Pink, and Red. Culpitt Cake Boards, Cake Cards, and Cake Drums are a necessity in any busy kitchen. Also available pre-packed with matching boxes for ease. Cake Decorations Edible Cake Toppers are the perfect way to easily finish cupcakes, cakes, and other sweet treats. Culpitt toppers are handmade and a great way to add intricate details to cakes, especially at busy times or the year or if baking with the family. Cake Boxes Protect your precious cakes, decorations, cupcakes, and desserts. The Culpitt Cake Box range includes Tall Boxes for Tiered or Decorated Cakes, Oblong Boxes, Cupcake Boxes, Treat Boxes, and Cookie Boxes. Tall Cake Box & Board Set Satinara Fondant Sugar Paste Culpitt Select Cake Sprinkles Culpitt Select Food Flavours Culpitt Cake Boards & Drums Rectangular Board & Box Set Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,017 4.4 out of 5 stars 697 4.3 out of 5 stars 13 4.3 out of 5 stars 43 4.7 out of 5 stars 616 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,585 Price £7.49 £ 7 . 49 — no data — no data £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £7.49 £ 7 . 49 Description Perfect for all types of sponge and fruit cakes these board and box sets will hold nearly any type of cake. Satinara Sugarpaste's no-fail formulation means that it can be used by experts or home bakers and will always deliver a crack-free silky smooth finish. Culpitt Select Sugar Sprinkles are a perfect way to add bright rainbow colours to your birthday cakes, cupcakes, or fairy cakes and of course ice cream and desserts! Transform your baking with these food flavourings from Culpitt Select. Add to cakes, desserts, cookies, and ice-cream for a delicate but delicious flavour. A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations! Rectangular Board and Box sets are brilliant for tray bakes and number cakes whether you're celebrating a special birthday or anniversary!
